# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_http_80
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    traffic_direction: INBOUND
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: api_gateway_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          use_remote_address: true
          xff_num_trusted_hops: 0
          generate_request_id: true
          preserve_external_request_id: true
          normalize_path: true
          merge_slashes: true
          request_timeout: 30s
          stream_idle_timeout: 300s
          idle_timeout: 60s
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
          http2_protocol_options:
            max_concurrent_streams: 1000
            initial_stream_window_size: 65536
            initial_connection_window_size: 1048576
          access_log:
          - name: envoy.access_loggers.stdout
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.access_loggers.stream.v3.StdoutAccessLog
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: api_gateway
              domains: ["*"]
              request_headers_to_add:
              - header:
                  key: x-forwarded-proto
                  value: http
                append_action: APPEND_IF_EXISTS_OR_ADD
              routes:
              - name: healthz_local
                match:
                  path: "/healthz"
                direct_response:
                  status: 200
                  body:
                    inline_string: "ok"
              - name: users_service
                match:
                  prefix: "/users"
                route:
                  cluster: users_service
                  timeout: 30s
                  retry_policy:
                    retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                    num_retries: 2
                    per_try_timeout: 5s
                    retriable_status_codes: [502, 503, 504]
              - name: orders_service
                match:
                  prefix: "/orders"
                route:
                  cluster: orders_service
                  timeout: 30s
                  retry_policy:
                    retry_on: "5xx,connect-failure,refused-stream,reset,unavailable,cancelled,retriable-status-codes"
                    num_retries: 2
                    per_try_timeout: 5s
                    retriable_status_codes: [502, 503, 504]
              - name: default_backend
                match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: default_backend
                  timeout: 30s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: users_service
    type: STRICT_DNS
    connect_timeout: 2s
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: users_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: users.default.svc.cluster.local
                port_value: 8080
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
        keepalive_interval: 30
        keepalive_probes: 3
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 5000
        max_retries: 3
    common_lb_config:
      healthy_panic_threshold:
        value: 50
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 2s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        codec_client_type: HTTP1
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 399
    typed_extension_protocol_options:
      envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
        common_http_protocol_options:
          idle_timeout: 60s
        explicit_http_config:
          http_protocol_options: {}
    per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
    outlier_detection:
      consecutive_5xx: 5
      interval: 10s
      base_ejection_time: 30s
      max_ejection_percent: 50

  - name: orders_service
    type: STRICT_DNS
    connect_timeout: 2s
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: orders_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: orders.default.svc.cluster.local
                port_value: 8080
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
        keepalive_interval: 30
        keepalive_probes: 3
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 5000
        max_retries: 3
    common_lb_config:
      healthy_panic_threshold:
        value: 50
    health_checks:

      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2
      http_health_check:
        path: /health
        codec_client_type: HTTP1
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 399
    typed_extension_protocol_options:
      envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
        "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
        common_http_protocol_options:
          idle_timeout: 60s
        explicit_http_config:
          http_protocol_options: {}
    per_connection_buffer_limit_bytes: 32768
    outlier_detection:
      consecutive_5xx: 5
      interval: 10s
      base_ejection_time: 30s
      max_ejection_percent: 50

  - name: default_backend
    type: STRICT_DNS
    connect_timeout: 2s
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: default_backend
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: api.default.svc.cluster.local
                port_value: 8080
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_time: 300
        keepalive_interval: 30
        keepalive_probes: 3
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 5000
        max_retries: 3
    common_lb_config:
      healthy_panic_threshold:
        value: 50

      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 2
      healthy_threshold: 2

        path: /health
        codec_client_type: HTTP1
        expected_statuses:
        - start: 200
          end: 399
    typed_extension_protocol_options:
      envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:

        common_http_protocol_options:
          idle_timeout: 60s
        explicit_http_config:
          http_protocol_options: {}

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
